suite.name: Login Crypto Test

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=backend, url=http://localhost:3000, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

test.name: Login With Encrypted Credentials Returns 200

kw.name: Prepare Crypto Test User
Get Decrypted Text
kw.doc: Decrypts cipher text and returns the plain text.

kw.name: Get Decrypted Text
kw.doc: Decrypts cipher text and returns the plain text.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/users path_url=/api/users headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '94'} body=b'{"username": "***", "email": "***@cryptotest.com", "password": "***"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.
Purkaa kryptatut muuttujat ja luo testikäyttäjän.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login path_url=/api/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '56'} body=b'{"username": "***", "password": "***"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Delete Crypto Test User
DELETE On Session
kw.msg: DELETE Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/users/11 path_url=/api/users/11 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '0'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a DELETE request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.
Poistaa testikäyttäjän testin jälkeen.

test.doc: Purkaa kryptatut tunnukset, luo testikäyttäjän, kirjautuu sisään ja varmistaa onnistumisen. Siivoa lopuksi.

suite.doc: Tehtävä 6 – Kirjautumistesti jossa sekä käyttäjätunnus että salasana on kryptattu käyttäen CryptoLibrarya (NaCl/PyNaCl). Kryptatut arvot alkavat etuliitteellä "crypt:" ja puretaan automaattisesti testin ajon aikana yksityisavaimella.
